steps.title: Anmeldung (city registration)
steps.description: Register your address at the local Bürgeramt within 14 days of moving in.

steps.title: Register your Steuernummer
steps.description: Fill out Fragebogen zur steuerlichen Erfassung at your local Finanzamt.

steps.title: Health insurance selection
steps.description: Choose between public (gesetzlich) and private (privat) health insurance.

steps.title: Open business bank account
steps.description: Separate business and personal finances. Many online banks available.

steps.title: Register Gewerbe (trade license)
steps.description: Register at Gewerbeamt. Required for most activities except Freiberufler.

steps.title: Set up bookkeeping
steps.description: Choose EÜR method and set up tools for invoicing and tax tracking.

steps.title: First tax declaration
steps.description: Submit annual Einkommensteuererklärung via ELSTER.

deadlines.title: Anmeldung deadline
deadlines.description: Must register within 14 days of moving in

steps.title: Anmeldung (city registration)
steps.description: Register your address at Bürgeramt within 14 days.

steps.title: Get your Steuer-ID
steps.description: Automatically sent after Anmeldung. Give to employer for payroll.

steps.title: Health insurance registration
steps.description: Choose a public Krankenkasse. Employer helps with registration.

steps.title: Open a bank account
steps.description: Needed for salary. Many banks require Anmeldung first.

steps.title: Annual tax declaration (optional)
steps.description: Not mandatory for employees, but often results in a refund.

steps.title: Register at gemeente
steps.description: Register your address at the local municipality within 5 days of arrival.

steps.title: Get your BSN number
steps.description: Burgerservicenummer — issued at gemeente registration.

steps.title: Register at KVK
steps.description: Register your business at Kamer van Koophandel (eenmanszaak, VOF, or BV).

steps.title: Get BTW number (VAT)
steps.description: Issued by Belastingdienst after KVK registration.

steps.title: Health insurance (zorgverzekering)
steps.description: Mandatory basic insurance. Choose provider within 4 months.

steps.title: Open business bank account
steps.description: Separate personal and business finances.

steps.title: Set up bookkeeping
steps.description: Choose accounting software. Keep records for BTW and income tax.

steps.title: Register at mairie (city hall)
steps.description: Register your address at the local mairie. Get proof of residence.

steps.title: Get your numéro de sécurité sociale
steps.description: Apply for Social Security number at CPAM or through AMELI portal.

steps.title: Register as micro-entrepreneur
steps.description: Register on autoentrepreneur.urssaf.fr. Choose your activity (APE/NAF code).

steps.title: Receive your SIRET number
steps.description: Business ID issued after registration. Required for invoicing clients.

steps.title: Open a French bank account
steps.description: Dedicated business account required if revenue exceeds €10,000/year.

steps.title: Health insurance (CPAM)
steps.description: Auto-enrolled via URSSAF registration. Covers healthcare, maternity.

steps.title: First revenue declaration to URSSAF
steps.description: Declare turnover monthly or quarterly, even if €0. Pay social charges.

deadlines.title: Address registration
deadlines.description: Register within first weeks of arrival

steps.title: Get your Codice Fiscale
steps.description: Italian tax code. Apply at Agenzia delle Entrate or Italian consulate abroad.

steps.title: Register residence (Anagrafe)
steps.description: Register at your local Comune (town hall) to establish legal residency.

steps.title: Open Partita IVA
steps.description: Register for VAT at Agenzia delle Entrate (form AA9/12). Choose tax regime (Forfettario recommended: 5% flat tax for 5 years).

steps.title: Register with INPS
steps.description: Enroll in Gestione Separata for social security, pension, healthcare.

steps.title: Get PEC (certified email)
steps.description: Mandatory for all business communication. Get from an accredited provider.

steps.title: Set up e-invoicing (Fatturazione Elettronica)
steps.description: Mandatory for all Partita IVA holders. Use SdI-compliant software.

steps.title: Find a commercialista
steps.description: Italian accountant. Strongly recommended — manages tax filings, INPS, VAT.

deadlines.title: Permesso di Soggiorno
deadlines.description: Request within 8 working days of arrival (non-EU)

steps.title: Get your NIE number
steps.description: Número de Identidad de Extranjero — required for all legal/financial activity. Apply at police station or consulate.

steps.title: Register at Padrón Municipal
steps.description: Register your address at the local Ayuntamiento (town hall).

steps.title: Register as autónomo
steps.description: Register at Agencia Tributaria (AEAT) with form 036/037. Choose activity code (IAE).

steps.title: Register at Seguridad Social (RETA)
steps.description: Mandatory social security registration. First 12 months: €80/mo flat rate (tarifa plana).

steps.title: Open a Spanish bank account
steps.description: Needed for social security payments and client invoicing.

steps.title: Set up invoicing and bookkeeping
steps.description: Issue compliant invoices with IVA (21%). Keep records for quarterly declarations.

steps.title: First quarterly IVA/IRPF declaration
steps.description: File Modelo 303 (VAT) and Modelo 130 (IRPF) quarterly.

deadlines.title: NIE application
deadlines.description: Apply as soon as possible after arrival

steps.title: Register your address
steps.description: Register at the local municipality or city office.

steps.title: Get a tax number
steps.description: Apply for your local tax identification number.

steps.title: Health insurance
steps.description: Enroll in mandatory health insurance.
